subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #038 The Three Stations of the Divine Manifestations
subcodes.first_line: Know that, while the Manifestations of God possess infinite virtues and perfections, they occupy only three stations
subcodes.first_line_orig: بدان که مظاهر مقدسه را هرچند مقامات و کمالات غیر متناهیه است ولی کلیهء مراتب ایشان سه رتبه است
subcodes.subjects: @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @physical limitations of the Manifestation of God, @Word of God sanctified from time and place
